description: A flash flood has damaged IT equipment at the Denver Branch office. Document the six flood-affected assets in Snipe-IT by updating the status of ASSET-FD01, ASSET-FD02, and ASSET-FD05 to 'Out for Repair' and the status of ASSET-FD03, ASSET-FD04, and ASSET-FD06 to 'Lost/Stolen'. Add the text 'Flood damage - Denver Branch - 2025-03-01 - Insurance Claim #IC-2025-0342' to the Notes field of all six assets. Create an insurance claim summary report at ~/Desktop/insurance_claim_IC-2025-0342.txt that includes the six asset tags, the total replacement value of all six assets, and a breakdown showing the total repairable value and total write-off value.
